parts.text: Hi, I want to set up my business profile. I run Mario's Pizza in Nutley NJ.
Great, Mario's Pizza! Let me collect a few details. Which social media platforms are important for your business? (Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, X/Twitter, Yelp, Google Business Profile)
We're on Instagram @mariospizza_nj and we have a Facebook page at facebook.com/mariospizzanutley
Got it — Instagram @mariospizza_nj and Facebook at facebook.com/mariospizzanutley. Do you use any delivery platforms? (DoorDash, UberEats, Grubhub, etc.)
Yes, DoorDash and UberEats. And here's our menu: https://mariospizza.com/menu

DoorDash and UberEats noted, and menu URL https://mariospizza.com/menu saved. Which analyses would you like to run? You can pick multiple: Price analysis, Foot traffic forecast, SEO audit, Competitor breakdown, Social media audit.
I want to set up my profile. I own Glow Salon in Montclair NJ.
Welcome! Let's set up Glow Salon's profile. Which social media platforms are important for your business? (Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, X/Twitter, Yelp, Google Business Profile)
Just Instagram @glowsalonnj. Skip delivery — we're a salon. No menu either.
Got it — Instagram @glowsalonnj, no delivery platforms, no menu URL. Is https://glowsalon.com your current website?
